creator: togetherthinking13@gmail.com
text:
Isso is a lightweight, self-hosted commenting system like Disqus. It supports anonymous comments, keeps identity via cookies, and is easy to integrate with static websites using JavaScript and CORS. Perfect for minimalistic setups!
look for: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html https://snow-rider3d.io
